reviews.comment:
Gracias por la atención de las chicas NÉLIDA Y MARIELA, por su servicio, predisposición y profesionalidad en atención al cliente, sigan así chicas y espero tengan un reconocimiento por demás motivador para seguir por ese mismo camino… de buen trato, y excelencia al cliente

(Translated by Google)
Thank you to Nélida and Mariela for their attention, service, helpfulness, and professionalism in customer service. Keep up the good work, ladies, and I hope you receive this recognition, which will be very motivating for you to continue on this same path of excellent customer service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURYMnVQa3FBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Todas las mañanas voy a desayunar por ahí, un buen cafecito y un rico tostado para acompañar. Los chicos siempre me atienden, re amables, y rápidos. Cuando voy a cargar también, los playeros son los mejores de la zona

(Translated by Google)
Every morning I go there for breakfast, a good coffee and a delicious toasted sandwich. The guys there always serve me, they're really friendly and quick. When I go to fill up my gas tank, too; the gas station attendants are the best in the area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNYOTdQOEdBEAE

reviews.comment:
Paré a descansar después de una larga bicicleteada, disfruté unas ricas medialunas y un jugo bajo el aire acondicionado😌 las chicas muy buena onda

(Translated by Google)
I stopped to rest after a long bike ride, enjoyed some delicious croissants and juice in the air conditioning😌 the girls were very nice
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNYMTgtM0t3EAE

reviews.comment:
Fuimos el sábado a desayunar, la atención excelente, el tostado el mejor de ingeniero Maschwitz, pidaselo que no se van a arrepentir 😊

(Translated by Google)
We went for breakfast on Saturday, the service was excellent, the toast was the best in Ingeniero Maschwitz, order it, you won't regret it 😊
